{{Quote|Not everyone takes to the ice and snow with the ardor of the Pyn'gani.|[[Barra-Rona-Ban]]|<ref name="RoT">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>}}
The '''Pyn'gani''' were a [[Near-Human]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Polus]]. To protect them from the extreme cold of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], their [[City/Legends|cities]] were shielded by [[heat generator]]s. The Pyn'gani played a major role in developing the [[Carbon-freezing/Legends|carbon-freezing]] process, and [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] produced a large proportion of the income for Polus. One Pyn'gani was the reclusive [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Anno Wen-Chii]], who lived around [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]].

==Biology and appearance==
The Pyn'gani were a [[Near-Human]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]<ref name="EAW" /><ref name="EAWG">[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War'': Prima Official Game Guide]]</ref>—a classification for species very similar to [[Human/Legends|Humans]], but which through any number of factors evolved unique adaptations to their environment.<ref name="Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition">[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition|''Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game'', Second Edition]]</ref> As such, the Pyn'gani were bipedal and closely resembled Humans but had a [[brown]] skin pigmentation.<ref name="EAW" /> They adapted to tolerate the extreme cold of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]].<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Society and culture==
[[File:Polus-ground.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Pyn'gani structures on Polus]]
The Pyn'gani were a reclusive species living on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Polus]]<ref name="EAWG" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Oricho sector/Legends|Oricho sector]].<ref name="Atlas">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Polus was an arctic, mostly mountainous planet with one massive [[Frozen Polus Ocean|frozen ocean]]. The average daytime [[Temperature/Legends|temperature]] was fifty degrees below freezing, with frequent blizzards and [[Water/Legends|ice]] storms raging on the planet's surface.<ref name="EAWG" /> Pyn'gani lived in domed structures,<ref name="EAW" /> and as masters of thermal dynamics,<ref name="EAWG" /> they shielded their [[City/Legends|cities]] and habitats with a network of [[heat generator]]s and [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]] that protected them from Polus' extreme climate.<ref name="EAW" /><ref name="EAWG" /> In combat, the Pyn'gani used a [[carbonite gun]], a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-styled weapon capable of incapacitating both biological and mechanical targets.<ref name="EaW: FoC">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>

When the Pyn'gani ventured outside, they wore woolen coats—binding up their coat sleeves—with large hoods to protect them from the cold.<ref name="EAW" /><ref name="EAWG" />

==History==
The Pyn'gani were native to Polus.<ref name="EAW" /> At this [[Time/Legends|time]], the Pyn'gani [[Anno Wen-Chii]] was a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and had attained the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. The reclusive Master brought his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Nalia Adollu]] back to Polus that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="RoT" /> where both resided for a time hoping to learn more about how life evolved in the galaxy.<ref name="TCSWE" />

{{Gamemechanics}}
Polus was controlled by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], which was [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|at war]] with the reigning galactic government, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="EAW" /> Later, the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]], a criminal organization active in the galaxy, had raided the planet and [[Slavery/Legends|enslaved]] the Pyn'gani, enlisting them in its militia.<ref name="EaW: FoC" />

By the time of the Galactic Empire, the Pyn'gani had played a major role in developing the [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] [[Carbon-freezing/Legends|freezing process]] used to store goods for long-term shipment. [[Mining/Legends|Mining]] the valuable metal was a major source of income for the species around 0 BBY.<ref name="EAW" /><ref name="EAWG" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
The Pyn'gani first appeared in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' in [[2006]], and later appeared in an expansion to the game, ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'', as well. The species was also mentioned in the game's [[Star Wars: Empire at War: Prima Official Game Guide|corresponding]] [[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|guides]], and received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. The first Pyn'gani individual to be mentioned was Anno-Wen Chii in the [[2007]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''.
